reviews.author: Vidushi kamani
reviews.comment:
I have been loyal to one salon for years for all my hair services, but one experience can truly change your mind—and that’s exactly what happened at Geetanjali Salon. Their hair color service completely won me over and has made me choose this place forever.

The quality of service is outstanding, and a special mention to their Creative Head, Zufi—she is absolutely amazing. Polite, professional, and extremely knowledgeable about her craft. You ask, and she delivers exactly what you envision (often even better!).

Highly recommend Geetanjali Salon for anyone looking for expertise, creativity, and consistently great results.

reviews.author: Rameeza Lambey
reviews.comment: Went for hair colour and had a fabulous experience. Zufi is a very professional, hard working and a polite person. She explained me the entire process and how the old colour could be corrected with the new highlights. I would highly recommend this salon.

reviews.author: nitu singh
reviews.comment: Had an amazing experience with Asma! Absolutely loved her services for hair spa and haircut. She was very professional, patient, and understood exactly what would suit me best. My hair feels so soft, healthy, and beautifully styled now — she truly made me love my hair again! Highly recommend her services.

reviews.author: Surbhi Saboo
reviews.comment:

Then after a lot of review I went to Geetanjali and glad I got Shiraj who helped me with the hair… he was fantastic. So happy with the hair cut and the way he helped me with the hair.
Thank you Shiraj.

Also Abhay, the new salon manager is very warm and welcoming. His hospitality is amazing.

Big thanks and appreciation for both Siraj and Abhay.

YLG Salon.name: Enrich Salon Delphi Powai
YLG Salon.address: Ground Floor, Delphi A Wing, G-3, Orchard Ave, Hiranandani Gardens, Panchkutir Ganesh Nagar, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076, India

reviews.author: Drashti Shah
reviews.comment:
Went with my mom for the first time to get their basic mani-pedi and it was underwhelming to say the least.

Both the services combined took only 45 minutes? I don’t understand how that’s possible! It’s not like there were 2 people looking after us. Just one technician, who took 45 minutes for manicure and padicure. And there was 0 massage. They put the cream, let it be for 5 minutes and then wasted it off.

They tried upselling the services, making faces after looking at my mom’s feet as if she needs some kind of saving that their service can do!

The nail polish quality is so bad. It clipped almost immediately. And to think that they use the same brand for gel polish is applauding.

Sangeeta for facial seems good. Jaideep is okay for mani-pedi.

The staff who looks after selling you cosmetics is so poor. They get a 1/10 from my side.

Never stepping my foot in any of the Enrich salons ever again

reviews.author: Akshita Mittal
reviews.comment: Excellent experience!! I had never had my hair colored before, so obviously I was a bit sceptical; but Ashu took time and answered all my questions and very patiently understood my requirements. The end result was not only perfectly aligned with what I imagined, but actually surpassed my expectations! It was a very tricky hairstyle, but Ashu did it effortlessly. I am truly happy with my hairstyle, and would recommend Enrich to anyone who wants any hair treatment done. Had lots of fun!

reviews.author: trupty anjara
reviews.comment: Went for the first time here.. for a regular hair spa.. made a mistake of telling them that I gotta rush back.. going by the brand i assumed the Technicians will be equally trained.. here's the part - the technician started the pre-wash at 12:45 and the after wash was done at 01:14.. he seemed like a first timer.. it seems a kerastase spa is only for 30mins including a massage of 10mins.. maybe I'm a newbie!! Not at all recommended..!!

reviews.author: Deepika Chauhan707
reviews.comment:
Hi Team,

I am writing to share my feedback regarding my recent visit to Enrich salon Delphi powai.

Unfortunately, I was quite disappointed with the overall experience. The staff member who assisted me had a very negative attitude throughout the service. He made several unpleasant remarks about my hair, which made me uncomfortable and unwelcome. As a customer, I expect a respectful and professional approach, which was clearly lacking.

I had opted for a luxury hair wash and haircut, but the entire service was completed in approximately 15 minutes, which did not reflect the quality or value promised. Additionally, despite having a confirmed appointment, I had to wait nearly 30 minutes due to issues with checking the booking in the system. This delay could have been handled more efficiently.

I also felt that the staff’s behavior toward me was influenced by the fact that I was using a “buy 1 get 1” offer. It seemed as though the service was being treated as if it were free, which is not acceptable. Every customer deserves the same level of service regardless of any promotional offer.

Since this was my first visit, I had higher expectations, and unfortunately, the experience did not meet them. First impressions matter, and this visit was not satisfactory.

I hope you will take this feedback seriously and work on improving customer experience and service quality.

Thank you.

Regards,
Deepika Chauhan

reviews.author: Monica Tanwar
reviews.comment:
Overall, the service is good. I have been taking services from Enrich for more than 10 years. The best part is their hygiene, though it can still be improved.
Currently, I am availing hair services from Mr. Asif at the Powai branch, Mumbai. He is highly skilled and has excellent expertise in his profession. He is very thorough and detailed in the services he provides.

He worked with great precision and made sure I was comfortable throughout the entire session. If you’re visiting this branch, definitely ask for Pratham Chavan—you won't be disappointed. 10/10.

reviews.author: haris .momin
reviews.comment:
​If you’re visiting Enrich at Lamington Road, I highly recommend booking with Mohammed Shoyeb.

​He is an absolute professional with a fantastic eye for detail. He took the time to understand exactly what I wanted and delivered a sharp, clean cut that perfectly suits my face shape. His technique is precise, and he clearly knows how to handle different hair textures with ease.

​The service was efficient, the finish was top-notch, and the overall experience was excellent. If you’re looking for a stylist who genuinely cares about the final result, Shoyeb is your guy.

reviews.author: Shabreen Shaikh
reviews.comment: I recently went to Enrich Salon for waxing and a hairstyle, and I’m really happy with the experience. The waxing was done by Suman ji with very carefully with minimal discomfort, and my hairstyle Arbaaz Khan did an amazing job with my hair. The staff was polite, hygienic, and professional. Thankyou both of you and special thanks to enrich team

reviews.author: Khushi Gala
reviews.comment: I have naturally curly hair and got a haircut along with a Fusio Dose by Keenal. She was very nice, patient, and did a great job. My curls feel healthy and look great. ☺️❤️

Green Trends.name: Lakme Salon For Him and Her in Dadar West,Mumbai
Green Trends.address: 1st Floor, Popatlal Niwas, A-WING, Ranade Rd, Bhawani Sankar, Dadar, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400028, India

reviews.author: SIDx
reviews.comment: Had a wonderful experience at Lakme Salon. I got my pedicure done by Meena, and she did an amazing job. The service was incredibly relaxing, professional, and handled with great care. My feet feel refreshed and well-groomed. As a man, I honestly didn’t expect to enjoy it this much, but I was genuinely impressed. Meena made the entire experience very comfortable. Highly recommended. ✨

reviews.author: Spandan Maskar
reviews.comment:
Absolutely disappointing experience and borderline misleading pricing.

I called the salon beforehand and clearly asked for the price of a men’s haircut. I was told it would be Rs 400. Based on that, I went ahead and got my haircut done. Once everything was finished, I was suddenly told my total bill was Rs 630 because I had received a “stylish” haircut.

Naturally, I asked what exactly counts as a normal haircut. The barber’s answer was vague and unhelpful. He just kept repeating “sir, normal haircut,” without explaining anything. When I pushed further, he said my mullet haircut is considered stylish, while a “normal” haircut is just normal. That explanation makes no sense. My hairstyle is not unusual, and I’ve been to many salons before. This is the first time I’ve been charged extra after the service without being informed upfront.

It gets worse. During the haircut, I asked how much a beard trim would cost. The barber casually said Rs 450. I questioned this immediately because I had just been told the haircut itself was Rs 400. How does a beard cost more than the haircut? His response was that Lakme provides them with a rate card and they have to follow it. That didn’t inspire any confidence, so I opted out of the beard service.

What this really shows is a lack of transparency and poor communication. Prices seem to change based on labels like “stylish” rather than being clearly explained before the service begins. The staff didn’t seem confident in explaining their own pricing and appeared more focused on upselling everything possible instead of being upfront and finishing what they started properly.

My advice to anyone considering this place: ask very specific questions, get every price confirmed clearly, and don’t assume the quoted rate will actually be what you pay at the end. Otherwise, be prepared for surprises at the billing counter.

reviews.author: Sanika Shetye
reviews.comment:
February 15, 2026

I chose this Lakme salon expecting a certain standard given the brand name. Unfortunately the experience was disappointing. This is not my usual salon but due to last minute availability elsewhere, I ended up here.

The salon is located on Ranade road, just a 5-minute walk from Dadar west metro station.

The salon seemed to be operating purely on the reputable branding.  At 11 am, the place was dimly lit, almost empty and staffed by only three people, including the receptionist.

I had requested a hair wash with blast dry along with a nail cut and filing. The person who started with my nails seemed inexperienced. She cut them so short that shaping them became impossible. They were left flat and uneven. Midway she was redirected to another walk-in customer and Rama took over.

Rama’s services were below expectations. While my hair was oily and needed a thorough wash, her technique felt more like scrubbing a kitchen slab than a scalp. Nail cutting and filing that she completed afterward was equally substandard.

Adding to the discomfort, the air conditioning was cooling properly, the lighting was inadequate, and the overall service quality was disappointing.

Overall it was a poor experience. I would not recommend this salon.

reviews.author: SrihariRangaraj Narendran
reviews.comment: The experience was average. The service itself was okay, but the staff tend to push customers toward more expensive options. They also didn’t really listen to what I was asking for, which made the experience a bit disappointing. Overall, it could be better with more attention to customer preferences.

reviews.author: sanjivni yatin
reviews.comment:
Hair treatment !

“Nisha did my relaxing pedicure and it was absolutely wonderful. Nisha and Jitesh also performed my Botoliss treatment and hair color — they took the time to explain what to expect, set clear expectations, and followed each step with great care. I’m very happy with the results. A big thank you to the rest of the team and Lakme Salon for their warm, professional service and for making my visit so comfortable!”

Definitely coming back for future haircuts :)

I also got my mother’s haircut done, and it turned out great with excellent volume and shape. We were both very satisfied with the service and the staff’s polite nature. Highly recommended—must visit without any doubt.

reviews.author: Deepa Dhere
reviews.comment: Imran did the best hair cut, hair spa and hair style and hair global hair color He suggested a different hair color and also added volume to my hair. He explains what you really need. And I recommend to visit Jawed Habib Rajkamal Yogi Nagar for a fabulous experience.

New look and life to my dull hair… thanks Javed Habib
